# Recurrent cells

Minimal gated recurrent cells (GRU, MinGRU). Used by the recurrent block types and as a sequence mixer inside the byte-latent encoder.

Registry: ``praxis.RECURRENT_REGISTRY`` (2 entries)

## `gru` - GRU

GRU wrapper using PyTorch's native implementation for use in SMEAR routing.

Source: [praxis/recurrent/gru.py:8](../praxis/recurrent/gru.py#L8)

## `min_gru` - MinGRU

This is a log-space implementation of minGRU: https://arxiv.org/abs/2410.01201
https://github.com/lucidrains/minGRU-pytorch/blob/main/minGRU_pytorch/minGRU.py

Source: [praxis/recurrent/min_gru.py:10](../praxis/recurrent/min_gru.py#L10)
